content:
🌟 Nano-PDF | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Editing PDF documents, particularly presentations or reports, by describing desired changes in natural language, making PDF modification more accessible and efficient.
✨ Key Features: • Natural Language Editing • Add New Slides • Non-Destructive Editing (OCR Re-hydration) • Multi-page & Parallel Processing
📖 Summary: Nano-PDF is a Python-based command-line tool that allows users to edit PDF documents using natural language prompts. It leverages Google's Gemini 3 Pro Image model to understand and execute edits, such as updating text or generating new content, while preserving the original document's structure and text layer through OCR.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
